login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: You can log in to the system with your email address and password.
login.error: An error occurred while logging in. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Register
register.description: Enter your information to create a new account.
register.fullNameDescription: Please enter your first and last name.
register.emailDescription: Your email address will be used for contact and verification.
register.passwordDescription: Set a secure password of at least 8 characters.
register.success: Registration successful. Please verify your email.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.description: We sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.hint: Click the link in the email to activate your account. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
verifyEmail.emailVerified: Your email has been verified! You can now log in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailDescription: The email address associated with your account.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.successHint: Check your spam folder if you don't see it. The link expires in 2 hours.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.passwordDescription: Set a secure password of at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.passwordConfirmDescription: Re-enter your new password to confirm.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.successHint: If you are not redirected, click the button below.
resetPassword.error: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
